caption: The video captures a man performing live music in front of an audience. He is seated and playing an acoustic guitar, wearing a white shirt with a black vest adorned with intricate designs. The man has glasses and his hair is tied back. He is singing into a microphone, which is positioned close to his mouth. The audience, visible from behind, appears engaged, with some members having their heads turned slightly towards the performer. The setting seems to be indoors, with wooden blinds covering the windows in the background, creating a warm and intimate atmosphere. The logo "ORCA" is displayed in the bottom right corner of the screen, suggesting that the performance might be part of an event or series associated with this organization.
